titleStmt.title: SII 6.1033: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1033. (A.R. No. 332-XXIII of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1318 gunēṁṭi māgha
śukla pratipada bhānuvāramunāṁḍu bhōgaparīkṣa
Arjunijīyyanaṁgāru tanaku Abhīṣṭārttasidhigā
nu śrīnarasiṁhyānāthuniki nityamunu Uttamadē
vimahādēvi bhōgāna dhuvaAvasaramaṁdunu veṁja
mara paṭuṭaku śrībhaṁḍāramaṁdunu padmanidhigaṁ
ḍamāḍalu 5 peṭi kuṁcaprasādamu vṛtigā bha
ḍaci sānulaṁdunu sōmi reḍi tami reḍi kuṁtuṟu
ciṁgāsāni saṁpradāyamaṁdunu puluUbhaIreḍi
kuṁtuṟu ciṁgāsāni Idaṟunu I prasādamu
bhujiṁci I kolupu ĀcaṁdrārkkastāIgānu koluvaga
laru . I dharmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī ni
tyamunu jaUṭapuUlu Aṭika 1 minuma
lu Aḍeṁḍu neI mānaṁḍu cēṟakuḍuva
palamu . khaṁḍamu palamu . cātaveṭa
nakunu śrībhaṁḍāramaṁdunu padmanidhi pe
ṭina gaṁḍamāḍalu 20 mahāpāḷakuḍu jī
tanakunu ma 5 naṁbhyāḷa daśabaṁdhanaku maṁḍaṁ
kumarulakunu Aṭikakunu māḍa 1 Iṁttānu Ā
caṁdrārkastāIgānu koluvaṁgalāru I dharmmu śrī
vaiṣṇava rakṣa śrī śrī śrī
Lines 22 to 28 are written on the proper right side of No.śrī Uttamamahādēvi bhōgāna Appalakunu
nityamunu neI Aḍḍalu 2 ciṁcaku neI vāni
kūṭini peṭanu śrībhaṁḍārananu padmanidhi gaṁḍa
māḍalu 100 peṭeṁgāna I bhōgānaku neI
śrībhaṁḍārāmaṁdunu Ācaṁdrārkastā
Igānu peṭaṁgalāru I darmu śrīvai
ṣṇava rakṣa śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1033 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
